units.description: Length preservation: the output has the same length as the input. (V002 paired control.)
common_failure_modes: stating only a length bound instead of equality

units.description: Sortedness: the output is sorted in nondecreasing order. (V002 paired control.)
Permutation: the output is a permutation of the input (equal multiset of elements). (V002 paired control.)
Stability is NOT required by the spec. (V002 paired control.)
